overall.description: First-person gameplay from a survival horror game set in a post-apocalyptic rural village at night. The player navigates through dilapidated indoor environments, transitions to outdoor areas with abandoned buildings, encounters NPCs near a campfire, traverses a flooded village path, and enters a building containing a shop with other characters.

segments.scene_description: The player explores the interior of an abandoned house, moving from a room with a broken window and old furniture through a narrow corridor toward a closed door. The environment is dark and dilapidated with peeling wallpaper and debris scattered on the floor.

segments.scene_description: The player opens a wooden door to reveal a brick-walled room with a window and table, then proceeds through an exit doorway to transition from the indoor environment to the outdoor night setting.

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a dark rural yard with a wooden fence and laundry hanging on a line. Moving past a brick garage and utility poles, the camera follows a dirt path alongside a long brick building under a clear night sky.

segments.scene_description: The player passes through a wooden gate to encounter NPCs near a campfire in front of a wooden house. After the NPCs run past, the camera continues along a path that becomes flooded with water, reflecting the dark sky and surrounding trees.

segments.scene_description: The player continues through a flooded village street lined with abandoned wooden houses and utility poles. Approaching a building with warm artificial lighting, the camera moves toward concrete steps and a closed door.

segments.scene_description: The player opens the door and enters a village shop interior with tiled floors. Inside, two NPCs stand near a wooden counter with shelves behind it, while a large freezer unit sits to the left. The warm interior lighting contrasts with the dark exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a decaying home into the open air of a desolate rural yard at night. It begins by navigating a dark, dilapidated room with peeling wallpaper and broken furniture, moving through a narrow corridor toward a closed door. As the player opens the wooden door, the scene shifts through a brick-walled room and an exit doorway, transitioning the perspective from the indoor ruins to the outdoor night setting. The camera then emerges into a dark yard featuring a wooden fence and hanging laundry before moving past a brick garage and utility poles. Finally, the view follows a dirt path alongside a long brick building under a clear, starry sky.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dark, outdoor village settlement into the warm, artificial light of a local shop. It begins by passing through a wooden gate toward NPCs gathered around a campfire in front of a house, before the camera moves forward onto a path that becomes heavily flooded. As the player navigates this water-logged street, the reflections of the dark sky and utility poles shift past abandoned wooden houses until a building with a warm glow comes into view. The camera then ascends concrete steps and opens a door, transitioning from the cold night air into a tiled shop interior. Finally, the scene settles inside the room, where the lighting shifts to a bright interior glow illuminating a wooden counter, shelves, and a large freezer unit.
